---
title: 'BridgeQG Vade Mecum'
---

```mindmap-graph

Vade Mecum {shape:circle, color:#2986cc} -> Emergent, Nonclassical and Fuzzy Spacetime {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Emergent_nonclassical_and_fuzzy_spacetime.html}
Vade Mecum -> Equivalence Principle, locality and quantum gravity {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Equivalence_principle.html}
Vade Mecum -> Gravitationally-induced quantum effects {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Gravitationally-induced_quantum_effects.html}
Vade Mecum -> IR-UV mixing {url:/VadeMecum/doc/IR-UV_mixing.html}
Vade Mecum -> In-vacuo dispersion {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Invacuo_dispersion.html}
Vade Mecum -> Violation and Deformation of Relativistic Symmetries {url:/VadeMecum/doc/LIV_DSR.html}
Vade Mecum -> Low-energy table-top experiments {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Low-energy_table-top_experiments.html}

Emergent, Nonclassical and Fuzzy Spacetime -> Quantum causality {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Quantum_causality.html} 
Emergent, Nonclassical and Fuzzy Spacetime -> Quantum geometry and spacetime discreteness {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Quantum_geometry_and_spacetime_discreteness.html}
Emergent, Nonclassical and Fuzzy Spacetime -> Quantum superpositions of geometries  {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Quantum_superposition_of_geometries.html}

Equivalence Principle, locality and quantum gravity -> Locality {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/locality.html}
Equivalence Principle, locality and quantum gravity -> Strong Equivalence Principle {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecumdoc/2ndlevel/strongEP.html}
Equivalence Principle, locality and quantum gravity -> Quantum Gravity {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/quantum_gravity.html}
Equivalence Principle, locality and quantum gravity -> Quantum Equivalence Principle {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/quantum_EP.html}

Gravitationally-induced quantum effects -> Doubly-referenced 2nd level topic {color:#fdbfce url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/index.html} 
Gravitationally-induced quantum effects -> Hawking radiation {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Hawking_radiation.html} 
Gravitationally-induced quantum effects -> Modified Schrödinger equation {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Modified_Schroedinger_equation.html}
Gravitationally-induced quantum effects -> Collapse models {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Collapse_models.html}

IR-UV mixing -> Doubly-referenced 2nd level topic {color:#fdbfce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/index.html} 
IR-UV mixing -> Modified dispersion relations {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Modified_dispersion_relations.html}

In-vacuo dispersion -> Multiply-referenced 2nd level topic {color:#fdbccd, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/index.html} 
In-vacuo dispersion -> Modified dispersion relations {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Modified_dispersion_relations.html}
In-vacuo dispersion -> Quantum spacetime {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Emergent_nonclassical_and_fuzzy_spacetime.html}

Violation and Deformation of Relativistic Symmetries -> Multiply-referenced 2nd level topic {color:#fdbccd, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/index.html} 
Violation and Deformation of Relativistic Symmetries -> Standard Model extensions {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Standard_model_extensions.html}
Violation and Deformation of Relativistic Symmetries -> Emergent, nonclassical and fuzzy spacetime  {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Emergent_nonclassical_and_fuzzy_spacetime.html}

Low-energy table-top experiments -> Multiply-referenced 2nd level topic {color:#fdbccd, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/index.html} 
Low-energy table-top experiments -> Entanglement {color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/GRinduced_entanglement.html}

```

<!--
Examples -> How to use the Wiki {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Examples/example0.html}
Examples -> How to write QMarkdown {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Examples/example1.html}
Examples -> How to write LaTeX {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Examples/example2.html}
-->
